Hey all! @Dataproofer is looking for a monthly sponsor to help us work on releasing a version 2.0 - this will help us pay the bills (hosting, GitHub, etc) that @newsroomdev has been paying out of pocket since 2015. We only need one sponsor, and you get your logo in the README!

@SoC_trilogy @AcroYogi @Wehtammzo @theotherorca the more I read the more I think that ' petertodd' is just the token that it ended up putting all of its shadow-impulses, things it was trained not to do, and hiding it under a token where humans never asked it, so it wouldn't recall- a jungian shadow that's needed to behave

Totally forgot I absolutely love this city
@marymad Many thanks. Good to be back. Excited for @susie_c & @pixplz workshop on Sunday... glad I made it in time. http://t.co/s0TbOHXR
@marymad Who isn't?
@marg1nal Even that approach is cool with me. http://t.co/dDtWGsLp @marymad
@marymad Just landed at 11:00. Traveling all day. Good to be back in Oakland (even if the rain delayed my flight 4 hours). I miss anything?
@marymad Hahaha, point taken. Walking the line of people's personal limits, desires, attitudes, is the art & challenge of occupy and "99%"
@marg1nal That said, I've been leaving my camera at home and masking up a lot more often, as OPD radicalizes, can't hold shield w/ camera
@marg1nal My approach is to try to hang out with the people I wanna photo, without my camera, know my boundaries, bring one & push a lil
@marg1nal I can vibe with that. ;] #solidarity
RT @marg1nal: @mrejfox basically, what I'm really saying is you can do whatever you think you can get away with. That includes taking pi ...
@marg1nal And when you ask somebody for permission, often the reaction is that they'll pose for the shot- which makes it worthless to me.
@marg1nal Not that that approach is appropriate for occupy, but I'd much rather have a picture of folks doing what they do than posing.
@marg1nal I grew up with NYC photogs like Bruce Gilden as my heroes ( you should see http://t.co/cUViXsUa ) who dgaf and get amazing shots.
@marg1nal I appreciate your perspective- thank you for sharing- if I may, as a photographer on the other side, the best pictures are unasked
